Metadata.homeDescription: Alpha Investor on iOS - clearer portfolio view, AI insights based on your holdings, and five simple scores per stock. Join early access.
Metadata.privacyDescription: How we handle your data in Alpha Investor early access.
Metadata.termsDescription: Terms of use for the Alpha Investor site.

Home.headline: Your portfolio - clear, calm, and easy to understand.
Home.subhead: Live prices plus human insights - see your mix, spot concentration, and check five quick scores per stock. Fewer tabs - less guesswork.
Home.heroImageAlt: Alpha Investor screen showing five lenses - trend, valuation, risk, growth, momentum.
Home.heroDeckWalletAlt: Portfolio view with health score and allocation.
Home.heroDeckChartAlt: Stock detail with chart and performance.
Home.aiTitle: AI built around your portfolio - not the noise
Home.aiIntro: Alpha Pro ignores random takes and focuses on what you actually own - your positions, your weights, your risk. Clear signals - not a trading bot.
Home.aiExplain: You already invested - the hard part is knowing if your story still holds. Alpha shows where you're concentrated, where you're balanced, and where risk builds up - all from your portfolio.
Home.aiProHook: No predictions - no hype. Just clarity when markets get messy. Free gives you portfolios and charts - upgrade anytime for full AI insights.
Home.aiPillar1Body: See your mix instantly - and catch concentration before it becomes a problem.
Home.aiPillar2Body: Trend - valuation - risk - growth - momentum on one simple scale. Clear - fast - consistent.
Home.aiPillar3Body: Open any stock - get chart, context, and a short explanation in one place.
Home.featuresIntro: Portfolio, charts, and AI insights in one smooth flow - nothing to learn, nothing to memorize.
Home.feature1Body: Simple signals about mix and concentration - built to inform, not stress you out.
Home.feature2Body: Same scale on every stock - compare instantly without building your own tools.
Home.feature3Body: Chart - performance - context - and AI insight in one scroll.
Home.feature4Body: Your data stays yours - insights are generated only for your account.
Home.step1Body: Enter the positions you already track - no broker connection needed.
Home.step2Body: Charts, context, and live prices - all synced automatically.
Home.step3Body: Quick insights to help you understand your portfolio - fast.
Home.pricingTagline: $10/month in the app for full AI insights. Free covers everything else.
Home.pricingFreeBullet1: Portfolios, live prices, and charts - no AI layer
Home.pricingFreeBullet2: Same privacy - your data is never used for public models
Home.pricingProBullet1: AI insights built from your portfolio - not generic watchlists
Home.pricingProBullet2: Five lenses with clear, fast explanations
Home.pricingProBullet3: Chart, context, and AI combined in one view
Home.pricingDisclaimerLine: No promises - no magic returns. Just better understanding of your money.
Home.pricingFootnote: Subscriptions are handled in the app via Apple In-App Purchase. Price may vary by region. Android billing is coming. Manage or cancel anytime in your device settings.
Home.screensIntro: Real screens - built for real investing.
Home.screensBullet3: Stock view with chart and context
Home.screensReassure: Looks dense? It’s built to scan fast - everything is one tap away.
Home.screenSpotlightDetail: Same portfolio - different time views. Switch from days to years instantly.
Home.screenWalletDetail: Health signal, allocation, and concentration - explained simply.
Home.screenLensesDetail: Small scores + short explanation - quick decisions, not homework.
Home.screenInstrumentChartDetail: Timeframes, volume, and key stats - then scroll for context.
Home.screenChartDetail: Signals, lenses, and insights - all in one place.
Home.faq1A: No - this is a tool to help you understand your portfolio. You make the decisions.
Home.faq2A: It turns your data into short, clear insights - so you spend less time analyzing.
Home.faq3A: iOS today - Android is on the way.
Home.faq4Q: What happens after I join the waitlist?
Home.faq4A: You’ll get occasional updates about access and new releases. You can unsubscribe anytime.
Home.faq5Q: Where does market data come from?
Home.faq6A: Free includes portfolios, charts, and data. Alpha Pro adds full AI insights for $10/month.
Home.faq7Q: Do you train public models on my data?
Home.faq7A: No - your portfolio is used only to generate your insights.
Home.ctaSub: Join early access - small group, real feedback. No spam - just useful updates.
Home.formConsent: By joining, you agree we may email you about the product. See
Home.disclaimer: Not financial, tax, or legal advice - always verify decisions that affect your money.
Home.roadmapIntro: High-level direction only - priorities may change based on feedback.
Home.roadmapPhase1Body: Live today - portfolios, charts, and first AI insights.
Home.roadmapPhase2Body: Stronger models and better portfolio insights - still simple to use.
Home.roadmapPhase3Body: Same experience - expanded to a new platform.
Home.roadmapPhase4Body: Continuous improvements driven by real users.

Terms.title: Terms of use
Terms.intro: This site and waitlist are provided as-is. Replace with full terms before running campaigns.
Terms.bullet1: The product is still evolving - features may change.
Terms.bullet2: Nothing here is an offer to buy or sell securities.
